name: sgs/accordion-item
title: SGS Accordion Item
description: A single expandable panel within an accordion. Enter a title for the header and add any content blocks inside the panel body.

wrapper.label: Wrapper
wrapper._note: CONTENT-KIND composite mirror (SGS_Container_Wrapper 'content' kind) — no `layer` (root is a leaf details wrapper, not a grid/section layer), so the 12 ARRANGEMENT members are never asked. block.json declares no `spacing`/`typography` supports at all on this block, so padding/margin/gap/font-* are honest gaps, not omissions.

header.label: Header (parent-context styled)
header._note: Header text colour + background + toggle-icon colour are read from the PARENT sgs/accordion via block context (sgs/accordionHeaderColour, sgs/accordionHeaderBackground, sgs/accordionIconColour — see accordion/block.json's own `header`/`icon` elements, which are the true owners of those styles). This item's render.php only CONSUMES the context to emit a scoped rule; it has no styling attribute of its own to map, so no attrMap/prefix is declared here — documentation only, orphan-scan-exempt.

innerBlocks.label: Panel content
innerBlocks._note: Panel body is native InnerBlocks children (any block type) — each child owns its own typography/colour controls. Mirrors sgs/quote's quote-body element.
